panels.caption: 2 AM. The machine never sleeps.
panels.prompt: 1980s and 1990s Saturday morning cartoon animation art style. Think Hanna-Barbera meets early Don Bluth meets Batman The Animated Series. Thick black outlines on every element. Bright vivid colors — turquoise, purple, orange, hot pink, electric yellow. Slightly exaggerated character proportions. A figure at a glowing computer in a retro-futuristic room. The whole scene pops with saturated color and energy. Clean, bold, flat-ish with simple shading. No text, no speech bubbles.

panels.caption: Something's wrong.
panels.prompt: 80s/90s cartoon art style. Thick outlines, vivid colors. Expressive cartoon close-up — face showing dawning realization with cartoon exaggeration. Big eyes, clear expression, fun. The monitor glows vivid green behind them. Saturated colors: purple shirt, orange background light, turquoise screen glow. Clean cartoon shading. Fun and expressive even in the serious moment. No text.

panels.caption: The logs don't lie. The logic does.
panels.prompt: 80s cartoon style, vivid colors thick outlines. Error state on screen visualized with classic cartoon visual language — red warning symbols, animated-style alert graphics. The character's expression is dramatic cartoon concern. Bright and vivid — hot pink and electric yellow accent colors. The energy of a cartoon villain's trap being discovered. No text.

panels.caption: There.
panels.prompt: 80s cartoon close-up. Classic cartoon lightbulb moment — the finding of the bug rendered with bright cartoon energy. Yellow starbursts, a pointing finger, a face with huge cartoon eyes showing the click of recognition. Bold vivid colors, clean thick outlines. Joyful. The visual language of cartoon discovery. No text.

panels.caption: Fix it. Ship it. Move on.
panels.prompt: 80s/90s cartoon action panel. Typing fast with cartoon speed lines, the expression focused and confident. The screen blazes green with success. Vivid saturated colors everywhere. Thick black outlines. The energy of a cartoon hero defeating the villain — in this case, the bug. Bright, fun, explosive with color. No text.

panels.caption: 3:17 AM. Tests pass. The city doesn't know. Doesn't need to.
panels.prompt: 80s cartoon wide panel. The character at their desk in a vivid colorful room, screen glowing bright green, city outside the window rendered in cheerful cartoon style — colorful buildings, cartoon stars, a cartoon moon. Thick outlines on everything. Saturated colors: turquoise, purple, orange, hot pink sky. The warmth and color of a cartoon world at 3am. Clean, bold, alive with color. No text.
